bakery_morning_rhythm.truth: The bakery begins work early and is busiest in the morning.
distortions: The bakery sometimes starts before dawn.

ashcroft_garden_restored.truth: The Ashcroft Cottage garden has been brought back into use.
distortions: Someone has started working the Ashcroft garden again.

railway_halt_avoided.truth: Some residents avoid lingering at the railway halt after dark.
distortions: Nobody sensible waits at the railway halt after dark.
People say the last train is not always the last arrival.

green_workday_custom.truth: Residents sometimes organise a workday on the village green.
distortions: The village green workday is practically compulsory.

old_boundary_dispute.truth: Older parish and farm records disagree about one narrow strip beyond Calder Farm.
distortions: The Calders moved a boundary stone years ago.
Nobody owns the strip beyond the old wall.

missing_waymarker_route.truth: An older walking route through the north woods appears in local recollection but not on the current forestry map.
distortions: The woods hide paths from people who should not be there.
The missing route leads back to where it began.

unseasonal_animal_pattern.truth: Residents have occasionally noticed several animal species changing their usual activity at the same time.
distortions: All the birds go quiet before Bellwether changes.
The animals know what the village wants.
